rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically and contextually close to the citing paper: both model physician-level pharmaceutical promotion response with hierarchical Bayes/random coefficients and focus on bias from problematic marketing variables (nonrandom detailing allocation vs unobserved competitor promotion). Given this strong overlap in setting and modeling approach from the notes, the citation could plausibly be a foundational or method source rather than a casual mention. Although the raw match is only a DOI reference entry (no local citation context), this is not safe to drop.
